leadText: Steam Eruption (Japanese: スチームバースト Steam Burst) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation VI. It is the signature move of Volcanion.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations VI to VII 1.2 Generation VIII onwards 1.2.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.2.2 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations VI to VII [ edit | edit source ] Steam Eruption deals damage and has a 30% chance of burning the target. Upon execution, Steam Eruption will thaw the user if frozen (even if the move fails to hit the target). Steam Eruption also thaws a frozen target hit by it. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] In Versions 1.0 to 1.2.1 of Pokémon Sword and Shield , Steam Eruption could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 1.3.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in previous generations. Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Steam Eruption cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Special Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 110 132 Cooldown 10s Move wind-up time 30 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect Chance 30% — — May burn the target.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA S V The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered. ZA The user attacks by immersing targets in superheated steam. This may also leave targets with a burn.
